plugins.name: steuer
plugins.author: kaiomp
plugins.tagline: German freelancer tax filing — fetch transactions, classify with AI, calculate EUR, file via ELSTER.
plugins.description: Steuer is a Claude Code plugin that automates the German freelancer tax workflow end-to-end. It parses Wise bank statements, classifies transactions into income and expense categories, calculates your EUR (Einnahmen-Ueberschuss-Rechnung), and walks you through filing via ELSTER.
features: Parse Wise CSV bank statements into structured transactions
Convert USD income to EUR using official ECB reference rates
Classify transactions with Claude into German tax categories
Generate Finanzamt-ready PDF and CSV reports
Step-by-step ELSTER filing guide tailored to your numbers
useCases: Freelancers paid in USD via Wise who file taxes in Germany
Solopreneurs preparing their annual EUR for the Finanzamt
Anyone who needs ECB-rate currency conversion with an audit trail

skills.name: parse-statements
skills.description: Parse Wise bank statements into structured transactions with date, amount, currency, and counterparty.

skills.name: calculate-euer
skills.description: Calculate your Einnahmen-Ueberschuss-Rechnung from classified transactions, with USD-to-EUR conversion at ECB rates.

skills.name: elster-guide
skills.description: Walk through ELSTER form filing line by line, mapping your EUR results to the right fields.
